verified.description: Whether the remote asset matches the stored checksum

variant.description: Resolved variant (e.g. 'linux/arm64'), empty string for universal

stored_hash.description: SHA-256 hash stored in the registry

remote_hash.description: SHA-256 hash computed from the remote asset (present when verified=false)

remote_etag.description: ETag header from the remote server (if available)

checked_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of the verification check
